messageHow: you either match squares and circles, or triangles and diamonds. You can't match two with the same pattern. I started by matching a red triangle with a red diamond, to get an orange one (triangle or diamond), then match that with the opposite shape (so if it was an orange triangle i'd match with a diamond, and keep doing this until you get a purple gem and THEN press space to fuse/harvest for 100000 points
messageRules: if two shapes mix, keep mixing the new crystal with the same shape to create new colours. Triangles combine with diamonds, squares only with circles etc. You can combine different colours or patterns too\nIf you get a purple gem don't forget to bank it

messageHow: Fuse a diamond with a triangle, followed by multiple more triangles to get a blue diamond. Fuse a circle with a square, followed by multiple more squares to get a blue circle. Aim to fuse similar patterns.
messageRules: I want to combine diamond and triangles, and circles and squares. Once combined, combine 2 more triangles (for first one) and 2 more squares (for second one).

messageHow: Concentrate on picking up items of the same shape, collect as many as you can until you get to purple, when you should cash in for maximum points.
messageRules: you need to merge gems of the same shape to make new gems. Pair up all of the same shapes first, when you have paired up enough to get to purple cash it in for points. Certain colours/patterns do not fuse together.

messageHow:
Remember to bank the points when reach purple
To fuse items you need to combine either:
Triangle first, followed by only diamonds
OR
Square first, followed by only circles
The only other rule is: Do not try to fuse like shaded items together - the shading patterns of the shapes must be different.
messageRules:
Bank on PURPLE

Triangle + Diamond + Diamond + Diamond

Square + Circle + Circle + Circle

messageHow: combine a solid red diamond with a patterned triangles until it goes blue then harvest, then move to a square and combine with circles until turns blue, then grab a triangle and combine with diamonds and finally get a circle and combine with the remaining squares
messageRules: diamonds and triangles, circles and squares

messageHow: focus on mixing circles with squares. Don't forget to bank the points when you hit a blue shape or better
messageRules: aim for high value shapes, keep attempting the same shapes by fusing

messageHow: Keep referring back to the list of Found Recipes on the right, as this will remind you what worked and what didn't. Remember you don't have to harvest crystals straight away. The big rewards come when you are carrying a high value crystal and succeed in merging it with another crystal to create one of even higher value.
messageRules:
triangles combine only with the diamonds and vice versa. The squares combine only with the circles and vice versa. Following this, choose a figure to start with and start matching with its geometric partner that has a different color or pattern.

Once you get a purple gem don't forget to bank it as any other combinations won't increase value!

Always check out the hints for each block at the top, you can plan your moves this way before randomly trying to find out what works best.
